journal_entry.description: Acquisition of land with building for factory construction, financed through installment note payable
journal_entry.rationale: Land is recorded at present value of future payments ($49,173,270) using 6% market rate. The existing building has no separate value as it will be demolished immediately. The liability is recorded at present value. This is a non-cash transaction at acquisition—only the present value is recorded initially.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Land acquired for factory construction is recorded at present value of installment payments. PV = $10,000,000 × 4.917324 (PV annuity factor, 6%, 6 periods) = $49,173,270. The building has no value since it's being demolished immediately—all cost is allocated to land. One asset increase (land), one liability increase (notes payable).
